# Quackenbush & Haegele

> Plumber serving Troy, NY and surrounding areas. Quackenbush & Haegele provides quality plumber services in Troy, NY. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Quackenbush & Haegele
- Category: Plumber
- Location: Serving Troy, NY, Troy, NY
- Phone: +1 518-235-3465
- Email: contact@quackenbush-haegele.com
- Rating: 4.6/5 from 10 reviews
- Years in business: 10
- Jobs completed: 200
